messages.subject: [R-jobs] Research statisticians
messages.body_plain:
Pioneer Hi-Bred, a DuPont business, is a leading developer and
supplier of advanced plant genetics to farmers worldwide.
Headquartered near Des Moines, Iowa, Pioneer is rated by TheScientist
as one of the best places to work. Within Pioneer, statisticians
develop statistical methods and work with scientists to support
research and development.

Pioneer currently has multiple openings for statisticians and expects
more in the near future. Masters and Ph.D.-level positions are open in
the areas of design and?analysis of experiments, quantitative
genetics, plant breeding, bioinformatics, and software development.
Visit our website (pioneer.com/careers) and use keyword "statistics"
in Iowa.? Check back for more positions as they become available.

--
Kevin Wright

messages.subject: [R-jobs]  Statistician Programmer, Full-Time, IMS Inc., Rockville, MD
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs]  Statistician Programmer, Full-Time, IMS Inc., Rockville, MD
messages.body_plain:
Statistician/Programmer needed in Rockville, MD.  IMS currently employs a small team of statisticians who work together and collaboratively with nationally recognized statisticians in the Biostatistics Branch, Division of Cancer and Epidemiology, in the National Cancer Institute (NCI).  Must have PhD in statistics or match.  Must have knowledge of statistical packages and R.  Genetic analysis background a plus.  For more info and to apply, visit www.IMSWEB.com.  EOE


Information in this e-mail may be confidential. It is intended only for the addressee(s) identified above. If you are not the addressee(s), or an employee or agent of the addressee(s), please note that any dissemination, distribution, or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this e-mail in error, please notify the sender of the error.
